title: Market Radar v1.9A Manifest Schema Contract
description: Single-source schema contract for Market Radar sender, generator, and history components. Defines two field tiers: Strict Core (missing → reject) and Flexible Payload (missing → warning only). v1.9A-S2 adds schema_version, Runtime Source constraints, type/value-range validation, PolicyReceipt, and Flexible Payload sanitization.

strict_core.description: Fields that MUST be present in every manifest. Missing any of these raises ValueError.

schema_version.description: Schema version identifier for compatibility checking. Must match '1.9A-S2'.

candidate_md_path.description: Relative path to the candidate markdown file from project root. Must be relative, no ../, allowed prefixes: results/, runs/, schemas/

candidate_json_path.description: Relative path to the candidate JSON metadata file from project root. Must be relative, no ../, allowed prefixes: results/, runs/, schemas/

preview_report_path.description: Relative path to the preview gate report markdown file from project root. Must be relative, no ../, allowed prefixes: results/, runs/, schemas/

parse_mode.description: Telegram parse mode for message rendering. Normalized to canonical: HTML, MarkdownV2, PlainText.

target_type.description: Target delivery channel type. Canonical: group, supergroup, test_group, fake.

max_send_count.description: Maximum number of times this artifact can be sent. Must be int >= 1. Lane 1 policy trims > 1 to 1.

blocked.description: Whether this artifact is blocked from sending. Must be bool.

leak_count.description: Number of sensitive information leaks detected. Must be int >= 0.

full_address_count.description: Number of full wallet addresses detected in the candidate. Must be int >= 0.

flexible_payload.description: Fields that are optional. Missing any of these logs a warning but does NOT block the manifest. S2 adds sanitization: truncation, control character removal, and parse-mode-specific escaping.

token_name.description: Token name, e.g. 'ETH', 'BTC'. Sanitized: max 32 chars, control chars removed.

symbol.description: Trading symbol, e.g. '$ETH', 'BTCUSDT'. Sanitized: max 16 chars, control chars removed.

wallet_short.description: Shortened wallet address, e.g. '0x082e...ca88'. Sanitized: max 24 chars, control chars removed.

pnl.description: Profit and loss value or percentage string

liquidation_distance.description: Distance to liquidation price, e.g. '-8.2%' or numeric

extra_context.description: Arbitrary extra context as key-value pairs. Sanitized: max 280 chars when serialized.
